rules.description: Template rebuild must consume required template files and export state.
Build gate must consume page_understanding artifacts for dual-image editable overlay pages.
No two text boxes may overlap after workspace assignment (catches OCR bbox collisions between sibling or cross-container text).
The no-text background image must not carry any readable primary text (SKILL.md dual_image_editable_overlay contract).
Parallel text at the same semantic role must share one bold/weight decision, not whatever OCR happened to observe (SKILL.md dual_image_editable_overlay contract).
